Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************************

 Double Transformations

 We define double transformations between lax double functors. In addition, we give
 some examples of these, namely the examples that are needed to construct the
 bicategory of double categories.

 Contents
 1. Preservation of the identity
 2. Preservation of composition
 3. Examples of double transformations

 **********************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedNatTrans.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.DoubleCategoryBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleFunctor.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1. Preservation of the identity *)
Definition double_nat_trans_hor_id
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂}
           {GG : twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂}
           {τ : F ⟹ G}
           (ττ : twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF GG)
           {I₁ : hor_id D₁}
           {I₂ : hor_id D₂}
           (FI : double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂)
           (GI : double_functor_hor_id GG I₁ I₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x : C₁),
     functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 ττ x x (double_id I₁ x)
     =
     transportb_disp_mor2
       (id_left _ @ !(id_right _))
       (id_left _ @ !(id_right _))
       (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell GI x).


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
τ: F ⟹ G
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF GG
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₁ I₂
isaprop (double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FI GI)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
τ: F ⟹ G
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF GG
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₁ I₂
isaprop (double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FI GI)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
τ: F ⟹ G
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF GG
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₁ I₂
t: C₁
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t : C₁,
    functor_double_id_cell FI t ;;2 ττ t t
                                      (double_id I₁ t) =
    trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (τ t) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                       GI t)) t)

  apply isaset_disp_mor.
Qed.

(** * 2. Preservation of composition *)
Definition double_nat_trans_hor_comp
           {C₁ C₂ : category}
           {D₁ : twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁}
           {D₂ : twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂}
           {F G : C₁ ⟶ C₂}
           {FF : twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂}
           {GG : twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂}
           {τ : F ⟹ G}
           (ττ : twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF GG)
           {Cm₁ : hor_comp D₁}
           {Cm₂ : hor_comp D₂}
           (FC : double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂)
           (GC : double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₁ Cm₂)
  : UU
  := ∏ (x y z : C₁)
       (h : D₁ x y)
       (k : D₁ y z),
     functor_double_comp_cell FC h k
     ;;2
     ττ _ _ (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)
     =
     transportb_disp_mor2
       (id_left _ @ !(id_right _))
       (id_left _ @ !(id_right _))
       (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (ττ _ _ h) (ττ _ _ k)
        ;;2
        functor_double_comp_cell GC h k).


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
τ: F ⟹ G
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF GG
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₁ Cm₂
isaprop (double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FC GC)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
τ: F ⟹ G
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF GG
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₁ Cm₂
isaprop (double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FC GC)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F, G: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₁ D₂
τ: F ⟹ G
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF GG
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₁ Cm₂
t, t0, t1: C₁
t2: D₁ t t0
t3: D₁ t0 t1
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t3 : D₁ t0 t1,
    functor_double_comp_cell FC t2 t3 ;;2 ττ t t1
                                            (double_hor_comp
                                               Cm₁ t2
                                               t3) =
    trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (ττ t t0 t2)
            (ττ t0 t1 t3) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                GC t2 t3)) t3)

  apply isaset_disp_mor.
Qed.

(** * 3. Examples of double transformations *)

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF) FI FI


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF) FI FI

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (FF x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (identity (F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                              FI x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (FF x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             FI x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (FF x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x =
functor_double_id_cell FI x

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (comp_twosided_disp_nat_trans ττ ττ') FFI FFI''


C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (comp_twosided_disp_nat_trans ττ ττ') FFI FFI''

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FFI x ;;2 
(ττ x x (double_id I x) ;;2 
 ττ' x x (double_id I x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x · τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FFI x ;;2 
(ττ x x (double_id I x) ;;2 
 ττ' x x (double_id I x)) = 
?b
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
?b =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x · τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x)

τ': F' ⟹ F''

FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'

ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''

I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FFI x ;;2 
(ττ x x (double_id I x) ;;2 
 ττ' x x (double_id I x)) = 
?b

τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''

ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trb₂ (functor_double_id_cell FFI x ;;2 
      ττ x x (double_id I x) ;;2 
      ττ' x x (double_id I x)) = 
?b

FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trb₂ (trb₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
            functor_double_id_cell FFI' x) ;;2 
      ττ' x x (double_id I x)) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''

D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'

ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''

FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'

FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'

ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trb₂ (trb₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
            functor_double_id_cell FFI' x ;;2 
            ττ' x x (double_id I x))) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''

D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trb₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI' x ;;2 
      ττ' x x (double_id I x)) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trb₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
            (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x ;;2 
             ττ' x x (double_id I x)))) = 
?b

    
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
            (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x ;;2 
             ττ' x x (double_id I x)))) = 
?b

      (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x ;;2 
       ττ' x x (double_id I x))) =

I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁

            double_id_mor I' 
              (τ' x) ;;2

C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trf₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I' (τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x) = 
?b

    apply idpath.
  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trf₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I' (τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x · τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trb₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x · τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I' (τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
trb₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I' (τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
      double_id_mor I' (τ' x) ;;2 
      functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
I: hor_id D
I': hor_id D'
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I I'
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I I'
FFI'': double_functor_hor_id FF'' I I'
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
ττI': double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ' FFI' FFI''
x: C₁
double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
double_id_mor I' (τ' x) ;;2 
functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x =
double_id_mor I' (τ x) ;;2 
double_id_mor I' (τ' x) ;;2 
functor_double_id_cell FFI'' x

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
GGI': double_functor_hor_id GG' I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ GGI GGI'
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (pre_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF ττ)
  (comp_hor_id FFI GGI) (comp_hor_id FFI GGI')


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
GGI': double_functor_hor_id GG' I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ GGI GGI'
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (pre_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF ττ)
  (comp_hor_id FFI GGI) (comp_hor_id FFI GGI')

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
GGI': double_functor_hor_id GG' I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ GGI GGI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI x)) ;;2 
ττ (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (pr1 τ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
             (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃

GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
GGI': double_functor_hor_id GG' I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ GGI GGI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI x)) ;;2 
ττ (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) = 
?b
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃

ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'

I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
GGI': double_functor_hor_id GG' I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ GGI GGI'
x: C₁
?b =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (pr1 τ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
             (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x))))

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂

GGI': double_functor_hor_id GG' I₂ I₃

x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
            ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI x) ;;2 
             ττ (F x) (F x) 
               (FF x x (double_id I₁ x))))) =

trf₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (τ (F x)) ;;2 
      (functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
       (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x))) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (pr1 τ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
             (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x))))

      (functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
       (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x))) = 
?b

    apply idpath.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
GGI': double_functor_hor_id GG' I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ GGI GGI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (pr1 τ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
      (functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
       (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (τ (F x)) ;;2 
      (functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
       (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
GGI': double_functor_hor_id GG' I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ GGI GGI'
x: C₁
double_id_mor I₃ (pr1 τ (pr1 F x)) ;;2 
(functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
 (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x)) =
double_id_mor I₃ (τ (F x)) ;;2 
(functor_double_id_cell GGI' (F x) ;;2 
 (#2 GG') (functor_double_id_cell FFI x))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (post_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans GG ττ)
  (comp_hor_id FFI GGI) (comp_hor_id FFI' GGI)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (post_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans GG ττ)
  (comp_hor_id FFI GGI) (comp_hor_id FFI' GGI)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI x)) ;;2 
(#2 GG) (ττ x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F' x) ;;2 
             (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x))))

?b

trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (functor_double_id_cell FFI x ;;2 
               ττ x x (double_id I₁ x)))) = 
?b

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F' x) ;;2 
             (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x))))

ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F' x) ;;2 
             (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x)))) =
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x))

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₃ (# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x)) ;;2 
            (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F' x) ;;2 
             (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x)))) =
?b

F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂

τ: F ⟹ F'

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃

FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂

ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃

FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂

ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
double_id_mor I₃ (# (pr1 G) (pr1 τ x)) ;;2 
functor_double_id_cell GGI 
  (F' x) = ?y'

      exact (functor_double_id_eq GGI (τ x)).
    
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃

FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
            (#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x))) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x)) = 
?b

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x)) = 
?b

    apply idpath.
  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x)) =
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
FFI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
FFI': double_functor_hor_id FF' I₁ I₂
GGI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
ττI: double_nat_trans_hor_id ττ FFI FFI'
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
(#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x)) ;;2 
(#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x) =
functor_double_id_cell GGI (F x) ;;2 
(#2 GG) (double_id_mor I₂ (τ x)) ;;2 
(#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FFI' x)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF))
  (comp_hor_id (identity_hor_id I₁) FI) FI


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF))
  (comp_hor_id (identity_hor_id I₁) FI) FI

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                        (id_two_disp
                                           (double_id
                                              I₁ x))) ;;2 
id_two_disp (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (identity (F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                              FI x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                        (id_two_disp
                                           (double_id
                                              I₁ x))) ;;2 
id_two_disp (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             FI x)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                        (id_two_disp
                                           (double_id
                                              I₁ x))) ;;2 
id_two_disp (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x)

                                        (id_two_disp
                                           (double_id
                                              I₁ x))) ;;2 
id_two_disp (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                        (id_two_disp
                                           (double_id
                                              I₁ x))) =
trf₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x

trf₂ functor_double_id_cell FI x

I₂: hor_id D₂

x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x =
functor_double_id_cell FI x

  apply idpath.

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)))
  (comp_hor_id FI (identity_hor_id I₂)) FI


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)))
  (comp_hor_id FI (identity_hor_id I₂)) FI

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
trf₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             FI x) ;;2 
id_two_disp (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (identity (F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                              FI x)

                                             FI x) ;;2 
id_two_disp (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (F x)) ;;2 functor_double_id_cell
                                             FI x)

x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (FF x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (identity (F x)) ;;2 (trf₂ 
                                             (functor_double_id_cell
                                                FI x ;;2 
                                              (#2 FF)
                                                (id_two_disp
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₁ x)))))

                                                 FI x ;;2 
                                                 (#2 FF)
                                                 (id_two_disp
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₁ x)))))

I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF) FI
  (comp_hor_id FI (identity_hor_id I₂))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (FF x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₂ (identity (F x)) ;;2 (trf₂ 
                                             (id_two_disp
                                                (double_id
                                                 I₂
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
                                              functor_double_id_cell
                                                FI x)))

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (FF x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (F x)) ;;2 (trf₂ (id_two_disp
                                                 (double_id
                                                 I₂
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
                                                 functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x)))

  
C₁, C₂: category

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x ;;2 id_two_disp
                                  (FF x x
                                     (double_id I₁ x)) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (trf₂ (id_two_disp (double_id I₂ (F x)) ;;2 
                  functor_double_id_cell FI x)))

C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell FI x =
functor_double_id_cell FI x

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH)))
  (comp_hor_id (comp_hor_id FI GI) HI)
  (comp_hor_id FI (comp_hor_id GI HI))


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH)))
  (comp_hor_id (comp_hor_id FI GI) HI)
  (comp_hor_id FI (comp_hor_id GI HI))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (trf₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x)))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
     (GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x))) ;;2 
             (#2 HH)
               ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (trf₂ 
                                               (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x)))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
     (GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x))) ;;2 
             (#2 HH)
               ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x) ;;2 
               (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
     (GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))) =
trb₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
            (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x))) ;;2 
             (#2 HH)
               ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x) ;;2 
               (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)) ;;2 
            id_two_disp
              (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
                 (GG (F x) (F x)
                    (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))))) =
trb₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
            (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     ((#2 GG)
                        (functor_double_id_cell FI x))))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x) ;;2 
               (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)) ;;2 
            id_two_disp
              (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
                 (GG (F x) (F x)
                    (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))))) =
trb₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₄
                    (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 HI
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x))))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x) ;;2 
               (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)) ;;2 
            id_two_disp
              (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
                 (GG (F x) (F x)
                    (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₄
                    (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 HI
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x))))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x)) ;;2 
      id_two_disp
        (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
           (GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x))))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
      (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
       (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x) ;;2 
               (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
      (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
       (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x) ;;2 
               (#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))) =
trf₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
      (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
       (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))))

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

I₂: hor_id D₂

GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI (F x)) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)) =
functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI (F x)) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH)))
  (comp_hor_id FI (comp_hor_id GI HI))
  (comp_hor_id (comp_hor_id FI GI) HI)


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH)))
  (comp_hor_id FI (comp_hor_id GI HI))
  (comp_hor_id (comp_hor_id FI GI) HI)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH) (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
     (GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
             (#2 HH)
               (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x) ;;2 
                      (#2 GG)
                        (functor_double_id_cell FI x))))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH) (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
     (GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))) =
trb₂ (double_id_mor I₄ (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
             (trf₂ (#2 HH)
                     (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x) ;;2 
                      (#2 GG)
                        (functor_double_id_cell FI x))))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH) (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F x))
     (GG (F x) (F x) (FF x x (double_id I₁ x)))) =
trb₂ (trf₂ (trf₂ (double_id_mor I₄
                    (identity (H (G (F x)))) ;;2 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 HI
                                                 (G
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 FI x))))))

            (#2 HH) (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)) ;;2

              ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH) (functor_double_id_cell GI (F x)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))) =
trf₂ (functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_id_cell
                                                 GI
                                                 (F x)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
I₁: hor_id D₁
I₂: hor_id D₂
I₃: hor_id D₃
I₄: hor_id D₄
FI: double_functor_hor_id FF I₁ I₂
GI: double_functor_hor_id GG I₂ I₃
HI: double_functor_hor_id HH I₃ I₄
x: C₁
functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI (F x)) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x)) =
functor_double_id_cell HI (G (F x)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_id_cell
                                             GI (F x)) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_id_cell FI x))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF) FC FC


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF) FC FC

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (FF x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (id_two_disp (FF x y h))
        (id_two_disp (FF y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                       FC h k)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (FF x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x y h) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂

h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (FF x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
Cm: hor_comp D
Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (comp_twosided_disp_nat_trans ττ ττ') FFC FFC''


C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
Cm: hor_comp D
Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (comp_twosided_disp_nat_trans ττ ττ') FFC FFC''

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
Cm: hor_comp D
Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''
x, y, z: C₁
h: D x y
k: D y z
functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k ;;2 
(ττ x z (double_hor_comp Cm h k) ;;2 
 ττ' x z (double_hor_comp Cm h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' 
        (ττ x y h ;;2 ττ' x y h)
        (ττ y z k ;;2 ττ' y z k) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k)

ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''

h: D x y
k: D y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k ;;2 
      ττ x z (double_hor_comp Cm h k) ;;2 
      ττ' x z (double_hor_comp Cm h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' 
        (ττ x y h ;;2 ττ' x y h)
        (ττ y z k ;;2 ττ' y z k) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k)

      ττ' x z (double_hor_comp Cm h k)) =

        (ττ x y h ;;2 ττ' x y h)

τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
Cm: hor_comp D
Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''
x, y, z: C₁
h: D x y
k: D y z
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k) ;;2 
      (trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' 
               (ττ' x y h) 
               (ττ' y z k) ;;2 
             functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' 
        (ττ x y h ;;2 ττ' x y h)
        (ττ y z k ;;2 ττ' y z k) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
Cm: hor_comp D
Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''
x, y, z: C₁
h: D x y
k: D y z
trf₂ (trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' 
              (ττ x y h) 
              (ττ y z k) ;;2 
            (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' 
               (ττ' x y h) 
               (ττ' y z k) ;;2 
             functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' 
        (ττ x y h ;;2 ττ' x y h)
        (ττ y z k ;;2 ττ' y z k) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k)

FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'

ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''

Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'

              (ττ y z k) ;;2

               (ττ' x y h)

       functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k)) =

ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''

Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''
x, y, z: C₁
h: D x y
k: D y z
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k) ;;2

Cm': hor_comp D'

FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'

ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''

C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
Cm: hor_comp D
Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''
x, y, z: C₁
h: D x y
k: D y z
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k) ;;2 
      (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ' x y h) (ττ' y z k) ;;2 
       functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k)) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k) ;;2 
      (double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ' x y h) (ττ' y z k) ;;2 
       functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k))

  
C₁, C₂: category
F, F', F'': C₁ ⟶ C₂
τ: F ⟹ F'
τ': F' ⟹ F''
D: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D': twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D D'
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D D'
FF'': twosided_disp_functor F'' F'' D D'
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
ττ': twosided_disp_nat_trans τ' τ' FF' FF''
Cm: hor_comp D
Cm': hor_comp D'
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm Cm'
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm Cm'
FFC'': double_functor_hor_comp FF'' Cm Cm'
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
ττC': double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ' FFC' FFC''
x, y, z: C₁
h: D x y
k: D y z
double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k) ;;2 
(double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ' x y h) (ττ' y z k) ;;2 
 functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k) =
double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k) ;;2 
(double_hor_comp_mor Cm' (ττ' x y h) (ττ' y z k) ;;2 
 functor_double_comp_cell FFC'' h k)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
GGC': double_functor_hor_comp GG' Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ GGC GGC'
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (pre_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF ττ)
  (comp_hor_comp FFC GGC) (comp_hor_comp FFC GGC')


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
GGC': double_functor_hor_comp GG' Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ GGC GGC'
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (pre_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF ττ)
  (comp_hor_comp FFC GGC) 
  (comp_hor_comp FFC GGC')

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
GGC': double_functor_hor_comp GG' Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ GGC GGC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k)) ;;2 
ττ (F x) (F z) (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
        (ττ (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (ττ (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC' 
               (FF x y h) 
               (FF y z k) ;;2 
             (#2 GG')
               (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

Cm₃: hor_comp D₃

GGC': double_functor_hor_comp GG' Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ GGC GGC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k) ;;2 
      ττ (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
        (ττ (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (ττ (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC' 
               (FF x y h) 
               (FF y z k) ;;2 
             (#2 GG')
               (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k))))

        (ττ (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))

C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
GGC': double_functor_hor_comp GG' Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ GGC GGC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
      ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k) ;;2 
       ττ (F x) (F z)
         (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
        (ττ (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (ττ (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (functor_double_comp_cell GGC' 
         (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
       (#2 GG') (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k)))

D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
GGC': double_functor_hor_comp GG' Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ GGC GGC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
        (ττ (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (ττ (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (functor_double_comp_cell GGC' 
         (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
       (#2 GG') (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃
        (ττ (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (ττ (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (functor_double_comp_cell GGC' 
         (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
       (#2 GG') (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G, G': C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: G ⟹ G'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
GG': twosided_disp_functor G' G' D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ GG GG'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
GGC': double_functor_hor_comp GG' Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ GGC GGC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ (ττ (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
  (ττ (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
(functor_double_comp_cell GGC' (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
 (#2 GG') (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k)) =
double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ (ττ (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
  (ττ (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
(functor_double_comp_cell GGC' (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
 (#2 GG') (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (post_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans GG ττ)
  (comp_hor_comp FFC GGC) (comp_hor_comp FFC' GGC)


C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (post_whisker_twosided_disp_nat_trans GG ττ)
  (comp_hor_comp FFC GGC) 
  (comp_hor_comp FFC' GGC)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC h k)) ;;2 
(#2 GG) (ττ x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ 
        ((#2 GG) (ττ x y h)) 
        ((#2 GG) (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
      (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
               (FF' x y h) 
               (FF' y z k) ;;2 
             (#2 GG)
               (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k))))

        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2

        ((#2 GG) (ττ y z k)) ;;2

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
              (FF x y h) 
              (FF y z k) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ 
                 (ττ x y h) 
                 (ττ y z k) ;;2 
               functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k))) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₃ 
        ((#2 GG) (ττ x y h)) 
        ((#2 GG) (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
      (trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
               (FF' x y h) 
               (FF' y z k) ;;2 
             (#2 GG)
               (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k))))
