              (FF x y h) 
              (FF y z k) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ 
                 (ττ x y h) 
                 (ττ y z k))) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
      (#2 GG)
        (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k)) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
              (FF x y h) 
              (FF y z k) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ 
                 (ττ x y h) 
                 (ττ y z k))) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
      (#2 GG)
        (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k)) =
trf₂ (trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
              (FF x y h) 
              (FF y z k) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ 
                 (ττ x y h) 
                 (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
            (#2 GG)
              (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
      (#2 GG)
        (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k)) =
trf₂ (functor_double_comp_cell GGC 
        (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
      (#2 GG)
        (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃: category
F, F': C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
τ: F ⟹ F'
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
FF': twosided_disp_functor F' F' D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
ττ: twosided_disp_nat_trans τ τ FF FF'
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
FFC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
FFC': double_functor_hor_comp FF' Cm₁ Cm₂
GGC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
ττC: double_nat_trans_hor_comp ττ FFC FFC'
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell GGC (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
(#2 GG)
  (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
(#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k) =
functor_double_comp_cell GGC (FF x y h) (FF y z k) ;;2 
(#2 GG)
  (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (ττ x y h) (ττ y z k)) ;;2 
(#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FFC' h k)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF))
  (comp_hor_comp (identity_hor_comp Cm₁) FI) FI


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₁) FF))
  (comp_hor_comp (identity_hor_comp Cm₁) FI) FI

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell FI h k ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                            (id_two_disp
                                               (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k))) ;;2 
id_two_disp (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (id_two_disp (FF x y h))
        (id_two_disp (FF y z k)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                       FI h k)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FI: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell FI h k ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                            (id_two_disp
                                               (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k))) ;;2 
id_two_disp (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x y h) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell FI h k)

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂

double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (twosided_disp_functor_identity D₂)))
  (comp_hor_comp FC (identity_hor_comp Cm₂)) FC

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂

trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x y h) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell FC h k) ;;2 id_two_disp
                                             (FF x z

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x y h) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ (trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
trb₂ functor_double_comp_cell FC h k

  
C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k =
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF) FC
  (comp_hor_comp (identity_hor_comp Cm₁) FC)


C₁, C₂: category
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans FF) FC
  (comp_hor_comp (identity_hor_comp Cm₁) FC)

D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 id_two_disp
                                      (FF x z
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            Cm₁ h k)) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₂ (id_two_disp (FF x y h))
        (id_two_disp (FF y z k)) ;;2 (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell
                                              FC h k ;;2 
                                            (#2 FF)
                                              (id_two_disp
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k)))))

        (double_hor_comp Cm₂ (FF x y h) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k ;;2 (#2 FF)
                                                 (id_two_disp
                                                 (double_hor_comp
                                                 Cm₁ h
                                                 k)))))

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
x, y, z: C₁

functor_double_comp_cell FC h k

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH)))
  (comp_hor_comp (comp_hor_comp FC GC) HC)
  (comp_hor_comp FC (comp_hor_comp GC HC))


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH)))
  (comp_hor_comp (comp_hor_comp FC GC) HC)
  (comp_hor_comp FC (comp_hor_comp GC HC))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F z))
     (GG (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃

GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄

Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (trb₂ (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F z))
     (GG (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))

  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F z))
     (GG (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =

              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (trb₂

                                                 y h))

        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))

                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC

                                                FC h k))) ;;2

  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F z))
     (GG (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (trb₂

                                                 HC

                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))

                                                 (#2 HH)

x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y

trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2

                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))) =

        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
              (id_two_disp
                 (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
                    (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
              (id_two_disp
                 (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
                    (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 
            (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
                     (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
                     (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     (functor_double_comp_cell GC
                        (FF x y h) (FF y z k))) ;;2 
             (#2 HH)
               ((#2 GG)
                  (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
              (id_two_disp
                 (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
                    (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
              (id_two_disp
                 (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
                    (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 
            (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
                     (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
                     (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     (functor_double_comp_cell GC
                        (FF x y h) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     ((#2 GG)
                        (functor_double_comp_cell FC h
                           k))))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
                    (id_two_disp
                       (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
                          (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
                    (id_two_disp
                       (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
                          (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 
                  (functor_double_comp_cell HC
                     (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
                     (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     (functor_double_comp_cell GC
                        (FF x y h) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
                   (#2 HH)
                     ((#2 GG)
                        (functor_double_comp_cell FC h
                           k))))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2

                                                 GC

                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k))) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₄
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h)))
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              ((#2 GG)
                 (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂

GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k))) =
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))

        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (trb₂ ((#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell

                                               (#2 HH)

                                          (functor_double_comp_cell

                                             (FF x y h)

      (#2 HH)

HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄

              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))

trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))

                                           (functor_double_comp_cell

D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃

FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell

                                                 (FF x

                                                 (FF y

            (#2 HH)
              ((#2 GG)
                 (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))) =

        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell

C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell HC
  (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
  (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                    (functor_double_comp_cell
                                       GC (FF x y h)
                                       (FF y z k)) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)) =
functor_double_comp_cell HC
  (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
  (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                    (functor_double_comp_cell
                                       GC (FF x y h)
                                       (FF y z k)) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH)))
  (comp_hor_comp FC (comp_hor_comp GC HC))
  (comp_hor_comp (comp_hor_comp FC GC) HC)


C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  (id_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     (comp_twosided_disp_functor FF
        (comp_twosided_disp_functor GG HH)))
  (comp_hor_comp FC (comp_hor_comp GC HC))
  (comp_hor_comp (comp_hor_comp FC GC) HC)

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F z))
     (GG (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F z))
     (GG (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F z))
     (GG (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
              (id_two_disp
                 (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
                    (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
              (id_two_disp
                 (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
                    (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 
            (functor_double_comp_cell HC
               (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
               (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) ;;2 
id_two_disp
  (HH (G (F x)) (G (F z))
     (GG (F x) (F z)
        (FF x z (double_hor_comp Cm₁ h k)))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
                    (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
                    (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 
                  (#2 HH)
                    (functor_double_comp_cell GC
                       (FF x y h) (FF y z k))) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              ((#2 GG)
                 (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (trb₂ 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k))) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              ((#2 GG)
                 (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (trb₂ 
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              ((#2 GG)
                 (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
              (id_two_disp
                 (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
                    (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
              (id_two_disp
                 (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
                    (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 
            (functor_double_comp_cell HC
               (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
               (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (double_hor_comp_mor Cm₄
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))))
        (id_two_disp
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp
        (double_hor_comp Cm₄
           (HH (G (F x)) (G (F y))
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h)))
           (HH (G (F y)) (G (F z))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)))) ;;2 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 HC
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F x)
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h))
                                                 (GG
                                                 (F y)
                                                 (F z)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k) ;;2 
                                                 (#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃

GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k) ;;2 
                                           (#2 GG)
                                             (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                FC h k)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (trb₂ ((#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                               (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁

GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 ((#2 HH)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
                                               (#2 HH)
                                                 ((#2 GG)
                                                 (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k)))))

F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 ((#2 HH)
                                           (functor_double_comp_cell
                                              GC
                                              (FF x y
                                                 h)
                                              (FF y z
                                                 k)) ;;2 
                                         (#2 HH)
                                           ((#2 GG)
                                              (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 FC h
                                                 k))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
              (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
              (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                                (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 GC
                                                 (FF x
                                                 y h)
                                                 (FF y
                                                 z k)) ;;2 
            (#2 HH)
              ((#2 GG)
                 (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))) =
trb₂ (functor_double_comp_cell HC
        (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
        (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                          (functor_double_comp_cell
                                             GC
                                             (FF x y h)
                                             (FF y z k)) ;;2 
      (#2 HH)
        ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)))

  
C₁, C₂, C₃, C₄: category
F: C₁ ⟶ C₂
G: C₂ ⟶ C₃
H: C₃ ⟶ C₄
D₁: twosided_disp_cat C₁ C₁
D₂: twosided_disp_cat C₂ C₂
D₃: twosided_disp_cat C₃ C₃
D₄: twosided_disp_cat C₄ C₄
FF: twosided_disp_functor F F D₁ D₂
GG: twosided_disp_functor G G D₂ D₃
HH: twosided_disp_functor H H D₃ D₄
Cm₁: hor_comp D₁
Cm₂: hor_comp D₂
Cm₃: hor_comp D₃
Cm₄: hor_comp D₄
FC: double_functor_hor_comp FF Cm₁ Cm₂
GC: double_functor_hor_comp GG Cm₂ Cm₃
HC: double_functor_hor_comp HH Cm₃ Cm₄
x, y, z: C₁
h: D₁ x y
k: D₁ y z
functor_double_comp_cell HC
  (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
  (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                    (functor_double_comp_cell
                                       GC (FF x y h)
                                       (FF y z k)) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k)) =
functor_double_comp_cell HC
  (GG (F x) (F y) (FF x y h))
  (GG (F y) (F z) (FF y z k)) ;;2 (#2 HH)
                                    (functor_double_comp_cell
                                       GC (FF x y h)
                                       (FF y z k)) ;;2 
(#2 HH) ((#2 GG) (functor_double_comp_cell FC h k))

  apply idpath.
Qed.
